name: shows
judge_question: Is this show worth the user's watch time?
dimensions: Writing, performances, production — at the level of the user's 7-rated shows?
Tonal/vibe match against beloved vs anti-signal shows (pacing, mood, sensibility).
Genre scores against the user's genre stats.
Episode count / seasons vs payoff — does it respect the user's time the way their top-rated shows do?
Closest analog among the user's top-rated shows. Name it.
Resemblance to the user's lowest-rated shows. HIGHER score = LESS risk.
